metadata.description: Claude Code plugins for XrmToolBox and Dynamics 365 / Dataverse development

plugins.name: xrmtoolbox-plugin-dev
plugins.description: Skill for building XrmToolBox plugins for Dynamics 365 / Dataverse. Scaffolding, architecture guidance, packaging, deployment, and publishing.
